tekst: Vozac CE firme Bok ekipa, zivim u Svedskoj 11 godina, imam svedsku putovnicu, slobodan sam ovaj te sljedeci tjedan te sam danas dosao u Kopenhagen autom, sutra se dajem u akciju trazenja posla di se vozi kamio CE, trazim posao di je placa po sindikatu 3F ATL, te trazim posao di se radi turnus. Mozete mi i preporuciti neke "tvornice, terminale " di ima hrpa kamiona, pozeljno di su vozaci sa "normalnim" placama, a ne ovi jadni ljudi sta voze slepericu za kikiriki. I am not interested in companies that do not pay according to 3F ATL. Can you recommend some companies where I could come, get acquainted, talk briefly with the dispatcher, I know Swedish, English, I have CE, ADR. Obzirom da ne zna Danski, koji bi svakako usput učio, vjerujem da bi bilo najbolje da upiše internacionalni razred. U koji razred bi on bio smješten? Deseti (prijelazni) ili nastavak srednje? tekst: Pozdrav dragi sunarodnjaci i pratitelji/prijatelji ove male grupe. Iskoristio bih priliku ovim putem pozvati sve zainteresirane sportase, u ovom slucaju nogometase, da nam se pridruze u stvaranju ekipe koja ce biti na duzi rok konkurentna u takmicenjima te isto tako konkurentna u "trecim" poluvremenima. Naime, evo vec krecemo uskoro sa trecom sezonom i pomalo je nevjerojatno da nas, s obzirom na broj ljudi koji prebiva u Kopenhagenu i okolici, ima tek nesto malo vise od dvadesetak koji su aktivni ili poluaktivni, a samo desetak koji su stvarno aktivni i daju neki svoj obol u ocuvanju ekipe i promoviranju hrvatskog imena, naroda ovdje u Danskoj. Kroz sami sport, u ovom slucaju nogomet, upoznajemo jedni druge, druzimo se, odlazimo na utakmice reprezentacije i stvaramo neku lijepu pricu. Medjutim, malo nas je i bilo bi lijepo kada bi se jos ljudi pridruzilo. Pogotovo kada citamo ovdje da nedostaje dogadjanja, kako se prosle godine mnogo ljudi zalilo. Sve je moguce ako nas je vise i ako imamo podrsku, nas nekolicina nazalost ne moze puno. Za nogomet vam ne treba puno, potrebno je malo znanja, volje, tenisice. Termine odrzavamo svake subote od 18-19 ili 20 u Grondal centru, ovisno o broju ljudi termin je sat ili dva. Igramo i ligu, dosta vas nas prati kroz nasu stranicu i znate da smo nakon dvije sezone izborili visi rang. Sa visim rangom dolaze i veca ocekivanja, ozbiljniji pristup i mozda mladje generacije. Opremu za ligu imamo, neka sredstva za "trece" poluvrijeme uvijek iznadjemo, pretezno vikendom igramo, liga isto tako pocinje pocetkom travnja i traje do sredine listopada - dakle ima mjesta za sve koji zele "ubiti" svoje vrijeme na zdravi nacin, pri tome, kao sto napisah na pocetku posta, nosis dres sa hrvatskim grbom i natpisom Croatia. Jesmo daleko od domovine, ali mislim da ne bi trebali biti daleko jedni od drugih. Uz nadu da ce ovaj post biti shvacen sa razumijevanjem zelim vam ugodnu vecer i ostatak radnog tjedna. P.S. Kroz nasu stranicu nam se mogu javiti zainteresirani te ce dobiti potrebne informacije. Otvoreni smo 0/24 .
tekst_en: Hello dear compatriots and followers/friends of this small group. I would like to use this opportunity to invite all interested athletes, in this case soccer players, to join us in creating a team that will be competitive in competitions in the long term and also competitive in the "third" halves. Namely, we are already starting the third season soon and it is a bit unbelievable that, considering the number of people who live in Copenhagen and the surrounding area, there are only a little more than twenty of us who are active or semi-active, and only a dozen who are really active and give some of their help in preserving the team and promoting the Croatian name, the people here in Denmark. Through the sport itself, in this case soccer, we get to know each other, hang out, go to national team matches and create a beautiful story. However, there are few of us and it would be nice if more people would join. Especially when we read here that there is a lack of events, as last year a lot of people got drunk. Everything is possible if there are more of us and if we have support, unfortunately a few of us cannot do much. You don't need much for soccer, you just need a little knowledge, will, and tennis shoes. We hold appointments every Saturday from 18-19 or 20 in the Grondal center, depending on the number of people, the appointment is an hour or two. We also play in the league, many of you follow us through our website and you know that after two seasons we won a higher rank. With a higher rank comes greater expectations, a more serious approach and perhaps younger generations. We have the equipment for the league, we always raise some funds for the "third" half, we mostly play on weekends, the league also starts at the beginning of April and lasts until the middle of October - so there is a place for everyone who wants to "kill" their time in a healthy way, while, as I wrote at the beginning of the post, wear a jersey with the Croatian coat of arms and the inscription Croatia. We are far from our homeland, but I think we shouldn't be far from each other. With the hope that this post will be understood with understanding, I wish you a pleasant evening and the rest of the working week. P.S. Interested parties can contact us through our website and they will receive the necessary information. We are open 0/24.

tekst: ‍ VATERPOLO U DANSKOJ – PRIDRUŽI NAM SE! U toku je Evropsko prvenstvo u vaterpolu, sigurno nas mnogo prati utakmice i vraća se dobra energija iz bazena Ako živiš u Danskoj i voliš vaterpolo – ili želiš da ga probaš – ovo je prava prilika! Naša vaterpolo grupa je uglavnom internacionalna: + još mnogo nacija Dobra atmosfera, sport, druženje i ozbiljan trening – ali bez pritiska. Svi su dobrodošli! • studenti • oni koji su ranije trenirali • oni koji nikad nisu igrali, ali žele da probaju • i mlađi i stariji Možeš doći na probni trening, videti kako izgleda, pa se tek onda odlučiti za prijavu. Više o nama: https://www.kustudenteridraet.dk/vand/vandpolo/water-polo/ Kontakt: pololeder@usgvand.dk Vidimo se u bazenu! ‍ Slobodno podelite objavu sa ekipom koja prati EP!
tekst_en: ‍ WATER POLO IN DENMARK – JOIN US! The European Water Polo Championship is underway, many of us are surely following the matches and the good energy from the pool is returning. If you live in Denmark and love water polo - or want to try it - this is the right opportunity! Our water polo group is mostly international:   many more nations Good atmosphere, sport, socializing and serious training - but without pressure. Everyone is welcome! • students • those who have trained before • those who have never played, but want to try • both younger and older You can come to a trial training, see how it looks, and only then decide to apply. More about us: https://www.kustudenteridraet.dk/vand/vandpolo/water-polo/ Contact: pololeder@usgvand.dk See you in the pool! ‍ Feel free to share the post with the EP team!

tekst: Dobar dan! Jedno pitanje kako ovdje funkcionira u vezi doktora kada vam se dijete razboli? Moj sin je već bolestan tjedan dana. Ima temperaturu i kašlje bez prestanka. Zvala sam njegovog doktora i rekli su mi da je nešto viralno i da nema potrebe da nas naruči za pregled. Jučer smo bili na hitnoj i više manje isto su mi rekli da je neka viroza. Ali nema poboljšanja kod njega. Jel netko imao ovakvo iskustvo ovdje u Danskoj? Hvala
tekst_en: Good afternoon! One question, how does it work here regarding doctors when your child gets sick? My son has been sick for a week now. He has a fever and coughs non-stop. I called his doctor and they told me that it was something viral and that there was no need for him to order us for an examination. Yesterday we went to the emergency room and they told me more or less the same thing that it was some kind of virus. But there is no improvement in him. Has anyone had this experience here in Denmark? Thanks

tekst: Tražimo više radnika za uzbudljiv projekt na CPH Aerodrom! GP Ventilation ApS traži nove članove tima za naš veliki projekt u Kopenhagenu. Nudimo odlične uvjete rada i priliku da budete dio dinamičnog i stručnog tima. Što nudimo: • Plaću po dogovoru • Dodatke: SH, fritid, Pension Denmark • Sigurne i moderne radne uvjete • Mogućnost učenja i razvoja Koga tražimo: • Prednost imaju kandidati s iskustvom u ventilaciji • Otvoreni smo i za kandidate bez iskustva, spremni smo vas naučiti sve što je potrebno • Motivirane, odgovorne i pouzdane radnike Ako želite postati dio našeg tima i sudjelovati u ovom uzbudljivom projektu, javite nam se! Pošaljite prijavu na: lo@gp-ventilation.dk Za više informacija nazovite: +45 7180 5150
tekst_en: We are looking for more workers for an exciting project at CPH Aerodrom! GP Ventilation ApS is looking for new team members for our big project in Copenhagen. We offer excellent working conditions and the opportunity to be part of a dynamic and professional team. What we offer: • Salary according to agreement • Supplements: SH, fritid, Pension Denmark • Safe and modern working conditions • Possibility of learning and development Who we are looking for: • Candidates with experience in ventilation are preferred • We are also open to candidates without experience, we are ready to teach you everything you need • Motivated, responsible and reliable workers If you want to become part of our team and participate in this exciting project, contact us! Send application to: lo@gp-ventilation.dk For more information call:  45 7180 5150

tekst: Tražimo automehaničara – Hillerød Tražimo kvalificiranog i iskusnog automehaničara za naš servis u Hillerødu. Postat ćete dio stabilnog tima, a svakodnevni posao uključuje servisiranje, popravke, dijagnostiku i ostale uobičajene radove na vozilima različitih marki. Zahtjevi: • Završeno obrazovanje za automehaničara • Samostalnost u radu i visoka razina kvalitete • Pouzdanost i pozitivan stav Nudimo: • Stalni posao na puno radno vrijeme • Dobre radne uvjete i profesionalno okruženje • Plaću prema kvalifikacijama Zainteresirani? Pošaljite svoju prijavu na dan@brdr-danbiler.dk ili nas kontaktirajte na 22595940

You will become part of a stable team, and the daily work includes servicing, repairs, diagnostics and other common work on vehicles of different brands. Requirements: • Completed education for a car mechanic • Independence in work and high level of quality • Reliability and positive attitude We offer: • Permanent full-time job • Good working conditions and professional environment • Salary according to qualifications Interested? Send your application to dan@brdr-danbiler.dk or contact us at 22595940

tekst_en: About 10 years ago, I was in Denmark...after I came back, they sent me that I have a tax refund, but that they don't have an account to pay it to because I never had an account there (the money went to the account of a woman because I worked underage), I didn't solve it then and I was fooled by it. Danish translation?

tekst: Djetailer na puno radno vrijeme / djelatnik za poliranje i pripremu - Zeland Stalni posao, dobra plata, službeni auto i važnost slobode. RenB åd.dk ubrzano raste i traži jednog kvalificiranog i predanog zaposlenika kao odlaznog servisera diljem Zelanda. Ako imate iskustva u njezi brodica, njezi automobila ili sličnim obrtama - i možete se uvjeriti u profesionalnu i kvalitetno orijentiranu tvrtku - onda ste vi taj kojeg tražimo. O poslu Kao naš novi zaposlenik, imat ćete odgovornost osigurati da svi zadaci budu obavljeni po najvišem standardu i sa punim zadovoljstvom kupaca. Uz to, bit će i uobičajeni neriješeni zadaci vezani za pripremu brodova. Proći ćete temeljitu obuku i očekujemo da se pojavite s pozitivnim stavom, možete pametno isplanirati svoje vrijeme i ostvariti rezultat na koji možete biti ponosni. Radovi se izvode prvenstveno kod kupca, u luci ili na našoj lokaciji, ali se mogu dogoditi i u drugim područjima Danske ovisno o zadatku. Nudimo • Fiksna, dobra plaća • Vlastiti službeni automobil sa svom potrebnom opremom • Sloboda pod odgovornošću • Prilika da postanete dio snažnog i ozbiljnog tima Vaši primarni zadaci za posao • Poliranje brodica • Priprema brodova • Bund boja • Pjeskarenje Jeste li zainteresirani? Ukoliko se vidite na poziciji, onda pošaljite svoju prijavu, CV i preporuke na info@renbaad.dk ili nas kontaktirajte na 31 32 69 29. Održavamo razgovore u tijeku i želimo da se mjesto što prije popuni. Mojh Aleksandar RenBåd.dk
tekst_en: Full Time Retailer / Polishing and Prepping Worker - Zealand Steady work, good pay, company car and the importance of freedom. RenB åd.dk is growing rapidly and is looking for one qualified and dedicated employee as an outgoing service technician throughout Zealand. If you have experience in boat care, car care or similar trades - and you can convince yourself of a professional and quality-oriented company - then you are the one we are looking for. About the job As our new employee, you will have the responsibility to ensure that all tasks are completed to the highest standard and to the full satisfaction of customers. In addition, there will be the usual unsolved tasks related to the preparation of ships. You will receive thorough training and we expect you to show up with a positive attitude, be able to plan your time wisely and achieve a result you can be proud of. The work is carried out primarily at the customer's place, in the port or at our location, but it can also take place in other areas of Denmark depending on the task. We offer • Fixed, good salary • Own company car with all necessary equipment • Freedom under responsibility • Opportunity to become part of a strong and serious team Your primary job tasks • Boat polishing • Boat preparation • Bund paint • Sandblasting Are you interested? If you see yourself in the position, then send your application, CV and references to info@renbaad.dk or contact us at 31 32 69 29. We are holding ongoing interviews and want the position to be filled as soon as possible. Mojh Aleksandar RenBåd.dk

tekst: Pozdrav svima! U sklopu projekta WORKMOBIL (Institut društvenih znanosti Ivo Pilar, Zagreb) istražujemo razloge odlaska mladih iz Hrvatske radi zaposlenja, iskustva rada u inozemstvu i razmišljanja o mogućem povratku. Stoga, pozivamo mlade (18–35) koji su napustili Hrvatsku radi posla i trenutno rade u nekoj od zemalja EU-31 (EU + UK, Norveška, Švicarska, Island i Lihtenštajn) da ispune anonimnu online anketu i podijele svoja iskustva! Ispunjavanje traje oko 15 minuta. Link na anketu: https://forms.office.com/e/pCF1gRqt0E
tekst_en: Hello everyone! As part of the WORKMOBIL project (Ivo Pilar Institute of Social Sciences, Zagreb), we investigate the reasons for young people leaving Croatia for employment, experience working abroad and thinking about a possible return. Therefore, we invite young people (18–35) who left Croatia for work and are currently working in one of the EU-31 countries (EU   UK, Norway, Switzerland, Iceland and Liechtenstein) to fill out an anonymous online survey and share their experiences! Filling takes about 15 minutes. Link to the survey: https://forms.office.com/e/pCF1gRqt0E

tekst: Pozdrav ljudi, Zanima me je li netko ovdje imao iskustva sa primanjem dagpenge (A-kasse) nakon završetka studija i mijenjanjem boravišne dozvole? Konkretno, završila sam master studije (2 godine) i trenutno sam u procesu potrage za full-time poslom. Obzirom da sam tu samo 2 godine, nemam permanent residence, i još uvijek sam na study permit-u. Interesira me da li je legalno i koliko dugo boraviti u Danskoj dok sam na A-kasse bez full-time zaposlenja? Pitam ovdje jer mi je SIRI u mail-u nakon što sam ih kontaktirala bio konktradiktoran u odnosu na ono što piše na stranici.
tekst_en: Hello people, I'm wondering if anyone here has had experience with receiving dagpenga (A-kasse) after completing their studies and changing their residence permit? Specifically, I finished my master's studies (2 years) and I am currently in the process of looking for a full-time job. Considering that I've only been here for 2 years, I don't have permanent residence, and I'm still on a study permit. I am interested in whether it is legal and for how long to stay in Denmark while I am on A-kasse without full-time employment? I'm asking here because SIRI in my email after I contacted them contradicted what was written on the site.

tekst: Dragi svi, Oprostite sto vas ometam ovim postom. Moje ime je Sinisa Lozo i kandidat sam za Aarhus Byråd za Moderaterne. Želim ukratko podijeliti za što se borim: Jaču podršku za internationals - mentorstvo, karijerne mogućnosti, učenje jezika, zajednica i naravno bolja zastupljenost internationals u byrådet. Više ekonomske slobode za općinu - manje državne kontrole, više lokalne odgovornosti. Bolju suradnju između općine i civilnog društva – nitko ne smije pasti između sustava. Besplatan školski obrok - zdravlje, jednakost i bolji početak dana. Ako živite u Aarhusu - vaš glas mi puno znači. Ali naravno, najvažnije je da svi izađemo i glasamo u utorak. Hvala!
tekst_en: Dear everyone, Sorry to bother you with this post. My name is Sinisa Lozo and I am a candidate for the Aarhus Byråd for the Moderates. I want to briefly share what I am fighting for: Stronger support for internationals - mentoring, career opportunities, language learning, community and of course better representation of internationals in the byrådet. More economic freedom for the municipality - less state control, more local responsibility. Better cooperation between the municipality and civil society - no one should fall between the systems. Free school meal - health, equality and a better start to the day. If you live in Aarhus - your vote means a lot to me. But of course, the most important thing is that we all go out and vote on Tuesday. Thanks!

tekst: Dear Croatians living in Denmark, please consider taking a look at this! Is your landlord being a jerk? Is your boss not paying you a proper salary? tekst: Pozdrav svima. Ja sam momak iz Haderslev koji voli u slobodno vrijeme cistiti auta. To mi je zanimacija pored glavnog posla. U prilozenom mozete vidjeti neke od mojih radova u zadnjih par sedmica. Ako vam se svidjaju rezultati a zivite u Haderslev ili okolini do 30 km i zelite da vam auto bude uvjek cist i uredan stojim na raspolaganju. Na slici imate prikazano vise informacija o ciscenju koje obavljam. Ako ste zainteresovani mozete mi se javiti u komentar ili privatnom porukom. Hvala unprijed. Nadam se da moj status ne krsi pravila ove grupe.
tekst_en: Hello everyone. I'm a guy from Haderslev who likes to clean cars in his spare time. It's my hobby in addition to my main job. In the attachment you can see some of my work in the last few weeks. If you like the results and you live in Haderslev or the surrounding area up to 30 km away and you want your car to always be clean and tidy, I am at your disposal. The picture shows more information about the cleaning I do. If you are interested, you can contact me in the comments or by private message. Thanks in advance. I hope my status does not violate the rules of this group.

tekst: Pozdrav svima! Planiram uskoro preseliti u Dansku i pri tome se prijaviti kao osoba s dovoljno sredstava za početak, dok ne nađem posao. Zainteresiran sam za vaša iskustva s ovakvim početkom života u Danskoj. Kako ste vi prošli kroz proces prijave i prilagodbu bez stalnog zaposlenja odmah na početku? Koji su bili najveći izazovi i što biste mi preporučili da izbjegnem ili na što se najviše pripremim? Veselim se vašim iskrenim savjetima i iskustvima, hvala unaprijed!
tekst_en: Hello everyone! I plan to move to Denmark soon and apply as a person with enough funds to start with, until I find a job. I am interested in your experiences with this kind of start to life in Denmark. How did you go through the application process and adjustment without permanent employment right at the beginning? tekst: Pozdrav ljudi, imam određenu brigu oko pronalaska posla nakon MSc studija. Ime mi je Emil i imam 23 godine, trenutno studiram na SDU Sonderborg i u zadnjoj sam godini svog diplomskog studija mehatronike , kako planiram za budućnost, nakon faksa želim ostati u Danskoj živjeti i raditi u struci. Znam, doslovce osnove Danskog jezika i živim trenutno u Sonderborgu već godinu dana, no planiram se preseliti u okolicu Kopenhagena na ljeto sljedeće godine i naivno s puno nade tražiti posao (po mogućnosti i ranije osigurati nešto, naravno). Znaju li možda ljudi koji su visoko obrazovani u ovoj grupi i kao ja već imaju neku diplomu na remenu, kakva je situacija za nas sa pronalaskom posla u području CPH, okolice CPH i Roskildea? No istovremeno, ako neće bit inženjerskog posla, zanimaju me i mogućnosti tehničarskih poslova i slično čisto da bi mi brod plovio do boljeg vremena. Stoga ako imate netko nešto za podijeliti rado bi volio čuti, iskustva i doživljaje. Hvala puno, bilo kakvi komentari su dobrodošli doslovce me samo zanima trenutno stanje na tržištu rada u tim regijama pa ako itko nešto zna, iskustva ili priče drugih ljudi i voljan je podijeliti ovdje... Jako bi mi značilo! Hvala vam puno, i ugodan vikend!
tekst_en: Hi guys, I have some concern about finding a job after my MSc studies. My name is Emil and I am 23 years old, I am currently studying at SDU Sonderborg and I am in the last year of my graduate study in mechatronics, as I plan for the future, after college I want to stay in Denmark to live and work professionally. I know, literally, the basics of the Danish language and I've been living in Sonderborg for a year now, but I plan to move to the Copenhagen area in the summer of next year and naively hope to look for a job (preferably to secure something earlier, of course). Do people who are highly educated in this group and, like me, already have a degree under their belt know what the situation is for us with finding a job in the area of ​​CPH, the surroundings of CPH and Roskilde? But at the same time, if there will be no engineering work, I am also interested in the possibilities of technical jobs and the like, purely to keep my ship sailing until better times. Therefore, if you have something to share, I would love to hear about it, experiences. Thank you very much, any comments are welcome, I'm literally just interested in the current state of the labor market in those regions, so if anyone knows anything, other people's experiences or stories and is willing to share here... It would mean a lot to me! Thank you very much, and have a nice weekend!

tekst: Pozdrav! Preselila sam se u Kalundborg pred mjesec dana jer sam počela studirati na Absalonu te mi jako treba studentski posao… Prijavila sam se svugdje od Netta, Normala, Fotexa, pa do restorana i kafića gdje su me odbili ili zbog nedostatka radnih mjesta ili zbog toga što nisam tečna u danskom… Imate li kakav prijedlog ili znate li nekog tko bi mi mogao pomoći? Imam dosta radnog iskustva: 4 ljeta sam radila kao administracijska asistentica u pomorskoj agenciji Simmor u Rijeci,uz to sam vikendima čistila apartmane. Govorim engleski, malo talijanskog te sam u procesu učenja danskog. Spremna sam odmah početi raditi, isto kao i doći uživo na upoznavanje i odraditi probnu smjenu besplatno:)
tekst_en: Greeting! I moved to Kalundborg a month ago because I started studying at Absalon and I really need a student job... I applied everywhere from Netto, Normal, Fotex, to restaurants and cafes where I was rejected either because of the lack of jobs or because I'm not fluent in Danish... Do you have any suggestions or do you know someone who could help me? I speak English, a little Italian and I am in the process of learning Danish. I'm ready to start working right away, as well as come live for an introduction and do a trial shift for free:)

tekst: Pomoć za ostvarenje sna o majčinstvu Drage žene između 18 i 35 godina: već se godinama borimo s neplodnošću jer moje jajne stanice ne dovode do trudnoće. To je iscrpljujuće za tijelo i dušu – godine prolaze, a mi i dalje ne možemo osnovati obitelj. Zbog toga sam sada već tri godine na listi čekanja za donatoricu. Već mi je dovoljno teško što ne mogu prenijeti gene svoje obitelji, a još je teže što su jedine donatorice koje mi se nude plavokose ili crvenokose Dankinje, koje nemaju nijednu moju karakteristiku. Stalno mi govore da nemaju nikoga tko paše mom opisu i vrlo rijetko dobiju nekoga takvog. Klinika mi je zato savjetovala da pokušam pronaći donatoricu putem Facebooka, jer vidjeli su da je tako netko drugi uspio. Zato vam se sada ovdje obraćam i od srca molim za pomoć – ako postoji žena smeđe kose i plavih očiju (ili smeđe oči, ali s jednim od roditelja ili baka/djed da ima plave oči, jer tada možete nositi plavi gen i vi), koja je razmišljala ili bi mogla razmisliti o tome da jednoj drugoj ženi pokloni najveći dar – svoje jajne stanice. Sve se odvija anonimno. Vi nećete znati tko sam ja, niti ću ja znati tko ste vi. Trebate same kontaktirati kliniku za plodnost u Køge na broj 47 32 12 60 i dogovoriti termin za vađenje krvi i zdravstvenu provjeru. Ako budete odobrene, započinje proces donacije. Za svaku donaciju dobivate najmanje 7.500 kruna (možda je iznos sada i viši), a koliko znam, dozvoljene su dvije donacije. Neću odgovarati na pitanja u objavi iz anonimnih razloga, pa molim da se sva pitanja postave klinici. Od srca vam hvala na vašem vremenu. Molim se Bogu da postoji barem jedna, ili više vas, koja bi kontaktirala kliniku i pomoći nam. Zauvijek ćemo vam biti zahvalni.
tekst_en: Help to achieve the dream of motherhood Dear women between 18 and 35 years old: we have been struggling with infertility for years because my eggs do not lead to pregnancy. It's exhausting for body and soul - years go by and we still can't start a family. That's why I've been on the waiting list for a donor for three years now. It's already hard enough for me that I can't pass on my family's genes, and it's even harder that the only donors offered to me are blond or red-haired Danes, who have none of my characteristics. They keep telling me they don't have anyone who fits my description and very rarely do they get someone like that. That's why the clinic advised me to try to find a donor through Facebook, because they saw that someone else had succeeded that way. That's why I'm turning to you now and asking for help from the bottom of my heart - if there is a woman with brown hair and blue eyes (or brown eyes, but with one of her parents or grandparents having blue eyes, because then you can carry the blue gene too), who has thought or could think about giving another woman the greatest gift - her eggs. Everything takes place anonymously. You will not know who I am, nor will I know who you are. You need to contact the fertility clinic in Køge on 47 32 12 60 and make an appointment for blood sampling and a health check. If you are approved, the donation process begins. For each donation, you get at least 7,500 crowns (perhaps the amount is higher now), and as far as I know, two donations are allowed. I will not be answering questions in the post for anonymous reasons, so please direct all questions to the clinic. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your time. I pray to God that there is at least one, or more of you, who would contact the clinic and help us. We will be forever grateful.

tekst: Lijepi pozdrav! Pitanje je vezano uz povredu potrošačkih prava pa me interesira kome se nadalje obratiti. Postoji li u DK nesto kao Agencija za prava potrošača ili sl, tko bi mi pomogao. tekst_en: Greetings! The question is related to the violation of consumer rights, so I am interested in whom to contact next. Is there something like the Consumer Rights Agency or similar in DK, who would help me. In a private clinic in the north of Denmark, I was given an accelerated injection with an expiration date, after the treatment I found the date on the package and went crazy with worry. Now I don't know what to do next. I'm afraid that I'm not the only one and if I don't react that it will continue to other patients as well. Thanks

tekst: Pozdrav svima, Imam par pitanja vezano za preseljenje u Dansku, pa molim iskustva onih koji već žive gore ili su živjeli. Mi smo tročlana obitelj koja razmišlja o preseljenju gore, muž radi kao operater obalne dizalice tako da bi se mogao prebaciti gore u njihovu luku u Kopenhagenu, koliko znamo plaća je odlična, kćer ima 13god, ja isto radim, ali bi gore vjerojatno za početak bila doma dok ne nađem nešto, pa i malo s kćerkom dok se ne prilagodi jer ipak dijete je to, da li je to izvedivo da ja budem doma, da li je dovoljno za početak za život gore cca 10, 12.000e, znam da se plaćaju tri stanarine unaprijed pa ne znam da li je to dovoljno s obzirom da ja sigurno neću moći odmah naći posao pa bi živjeli od njegove plaće. Kakve su škole i zdravstvo i da li je teško naći stan? Razmišljali smo o predgrađu Kopenhagena, što se tiče jezika već smo počeli učiti danski, to je po meni najmanji problem, naučit će se, više me brinu druge stvari, koliko je teško na početku? Klima nam ne smeta, ionako nismo neki ljubitelji vrućina, a i živimo u kišnom području. Hvala svima na odgovorima
tekst_en: Hello everyone, I have a few questions about moving to Denmark, so I'm asking for the experiences of those who already live there or have lived there. We are a family of three who are thinking of moving up there, the husband works as a coastal crane operator so he could be transferred up to their port in Copenhagen, as far as we know the salary is great, my daughter is 13 years old, I do the same, but I would probably be at home up there until I find something, and also a little with my daughter until she adapts because she is still a child, is it feasible for me to be at home, is it enough to start living up there for about 10, 12,000e, I know that three rents are paid in advance, so I don't know if that is enough considering that I certainly won't be able to find a job right away, so they would live on his salary. What are the schools and healthcare like, and is it difficult to find an apartment? We were thinking about the suburbs of Copenhagen, as far as the language is concerned, we have already started learning Danish, in my opinion that is the least problem, it will be learned, I am more concerned about other things, how difficult is it in the beginning? The climate does not bother us, we are not fans of heat anyway, and we live in a rainy area. Thanks everyone for the answers

tekst: Pozdrav ljudi, zivimo u Austriji no planiramo preseljenje u skandinavske zemlje... najvise zbog zdravlja sina koji je pri kraju s borbom s tumorom ima samo 3 godine, a i ja osobno imam neke zdravstvene probleme gdje bi mi u prilog isla hladnija klima...pa me zanimalo dali je tko od vas voljan kontaktirat me da mi malo objasni kakav je zivot tamo, zdravstvo, posao itd. tekst: Bok svima, imam pitanje koje nema toliko veze s Danskom, ali se nadam da ima netko u grupi tko bi znao odgovor. Putujem u Ameriku za 3 tjedna i pokusala sam se prijaviti za ESTA vizu. No postoji jedno polje koje se zove 'National Identification Number' i zbunilo me sto pise da taj broj mora biti iz razlicitog dokumenta od putovnice. Ja osobnu vise nemam jer sam odjavila adresu u Hrvatskoj. Ali cak i da imam, ne znam koji bi to broj bio na osobnoj. S druge strane u veleposlanstvu kazu da je National Identification Number nas OIB. Pokusala sam upisati i OIB u to polje, ali onda sam dobila warning da je to nevazeci oblik. Pa me zanima ako je netko putovao u Ameriku i susreo se sa istim problemom. Kako ste to rijesili? Puno hvala
tekst_en: Hi everyone, I have a question that has nothing to do with Denmark, but I hope there is someone in the group who knows the answer. I am traveling to America in 3 weeks and I tried to apply for an ESTA visa. But there is one field called 'National Identification Number' and I was confused by what it says that this number must be from a different document than the passport. I don't have a personal one anymore because I deregistered my address in Croatia. But even if I had, I don't know what number it would be on my personal account. On the other hand, the embassy says that our National Identification Number is OIB. I tried to enter OIB in that field, but then I got a warning that it was an invalid form. So I'm interested if anyone has traveled to America and encountered the same problem. How did you solve it? Thank you very much

tekst: Zdravo svima! Zovem se Mislav Kejić i trenutno živim u Osijeku (Hrvatska), ali tražim posao u Danskoj – najviše u skladištu. Imam iskustva kao skladištar i posedujem položen ispit za viljuškar (forklift). Radio sam na poslovima utovara/istovara robe, pakovanja, skeniranja i organizacije skladišta. Spreman sam na fizički rad i rad u smenama. Nemam još danske papire (CPR broj, radnu dozvolu), ali sam spreman da se preselim čim pronađem priliku. Otvoren sam i za poslove van skladišta ako se ukaže prilika. Ako neko zna za posao ili može da me uputi dalje – bio bih jako zahvalan. Možete mi pisati u inbox ili ostaviti komentar. Hvala puno unapred i veliki pozdrav! Mislav kejic
tekst_en: Hello everyone! My name is Mislav Kejić and I currently live in Osijek (Croatia), but I am looking for a job in Denmark - mostly in a warehouse. I have experience as a warehouseman and I have passed the exam for a forklift. I worked on the tasks of loading/unloading goods, packaging, scanning and warehouse organization. I am ready for physical work and shift work. I don't have Danish papers yet (CPR number, work permit), but I'm ready to move as soon as I find the opportunity. I am also open to work outside the warehouse if the opportunity arises. If anyone knows about the job or can direct me further - I would be very grateful. You can write to me in the inbox or leave a comment. Thank you very much in advance and best regards! Mislav Kejic

tekst_en: Insulator in Denmark - Armaflex Your Responsibilities: Installation of insulation on ventilation ducts and pipelines (Armaflex is done) Work according to industry standards and safety regulations Start of work: As soon as possible Benefits: Attractive salary: Basic hourly rate: €24.87 Example of earnings: For 52.5 hours per week - about €1,100 net per week That is approximately €4,730 net per month   in addition Free accommodation in single rooms Weekly allowance: €200 extra per week (if applicable with hourly rate calculation) Working hours: 45  hours per week (average 52.5h) Work schedule: 3 weeks work / 1 week off (possibility to work without breaks) Requirements: EU passport (required for legal work in Denmark) At least 2 years of documented experience in industrial insulation Experience with Armaflex insulation (required) Valid VCA, SCC, SSG certificate IPAF license Excellent knowledge of insulator techniques Ability to read technical blueprints is an advantage but not a requirement

tekst: Pozdrav svim dobronamjernim ljudima.Naime bio sam u Kalundborgu prije nekih godinu dana,bio zaposlen u Novo Nordisk gdje mi je poslodavac bio naš čovjek s dancem kao partnerom.Kada smo došli raditi iz HR gore,niti pola od onog što nam je rečeno nije bilo ispunjeno s njihove strane.Ekipa od osam ljudi svi smo dali otkaze.Pisem ovo jer jer bih se volio vratiti gore,ako ima posla za mene.U nadi sam da će netko možda pročitati ovo ,osoba koja je u Kalundborgu i koja možda zna za uredne poslodavce koji ispunjavaju svoja obećanja.Zanimanje mi je izolater,iskustvo višegodišnje.Moze i rad na građevini.Hvala svima koji pročitaju moj post.
tekst_en: Hello to all well-meaning people. I was in Kalundborg about a year ago, I was employed by Novo Nordisk, where my employer was our man with a Dane as a partner. When we came to work from HR up there, not even half of what we were told was fulfilled from their side. We all quit our team of eight people. I'm writing this because maybe I would like to go back up there, if there is work for me. I'm hoping that someone will read this, a person who is in Kalundborg and who might know about decent employers who fulfill their promises. My occupation is an insulator, many years of experience. I can also work in construction. Thank you to everyone who read my post.

S toga imam razgovor za posao nazad u Hrvatskoj i ako dobijem ponudu vraćam se u lijepu našu. Teške duše ali eto, tako je kako je. Barem ću biti blizuu obitelji i raditi u struci do koje mi je stalo, a ne u kafiću. Uglavnom, pišem jer me zanima imate li iskustva sa seljenjem iz danske nazad za hrvatsku što se tiče osobnih stvari, ne planiram nositi namještaj ali imam podosta stvari ovako i definitivno bih morala nekakav prijevoz smisliti za stvari. At least I will be close to my family and work in a profession I care about, not in a coffee shop. Basically, I'm writing because I'm interested in whether you have experience with moving from Denmark back to Croatia as far as personal things are concerned, I don't plan to carry furniture, but I have quite a lot of things like this and I would definitely have to think of some kind of transport for things. Thanks in advance

tekst: Dragi članovi grupe, jedan mali podsjetnik da je ova grupa za one koji su u Danskoj, kao i za one koji planiraju doći u Dansku, da na jednom mjestu mogu naći informacije vezane u život u Danskoj. Mi kao administratori se trudimo da grupa bude u što pozitivnijem tonu i zato imamo molbu da umjesto da trošite svoje dragocjeno vrijeme na negativne komentare, na provokacije, na stvaranje apsolutno nepotrebnih sukoba, preskočite objavu i uživajte ili napišite nešto konstruktivno. Ljudi koji postavljaju objave gdje traže pomoć ili savjet obično očekuju da im se jave ljudi koji im mogu pomoći ili dati savjet. Admini su vrlo tolerantne osobe, ali ako je jedini način da maknemo ljude iz grupe koji očito ne shvaćaju poantu ove grupe, radije ćemo maknuti tih par pojedinaca i uživati u prekrasnom danskom vremenu, nego da trošimo naše dragocjeno vrijeme u nadi da će se ljudi početi ponašati kulturno. Za kraj, anonimusi - Puštamo objave, ali ljudi moji, pa ne mora sve biti anonimno. Osjetljive stvari razumijemo, ali neke stvari nema smisla, slobodno podijelite tko ste. @everyone - želimo svima ugodno ljeto u nadi da će nam grupa biti još bolja! Vaši administratori
tekst_en: Dear members of the group, a small reminder that this group is for those who are in Denmark, as well as for those who plan to come to Denmark, so that they can find information related to life in Denmark in one place. As administrators, we try to keep the group in as positive a tone as possible, and that's why we ask that instead of spending your precious time on negative comments, on provocations, on creating absolutely unnecessary conflicts, skip the post and enjoy or write something constructive. People who post for help or advice usually expect to hear from people who can help or give advice. Admins are very tolerant people, but if the only way is to remove people from the group who clearly don't understand the point of this group, we'd rather remove those few individuals and enjoy the beautiful Danish weather than spend our precious time hoping that people will start behaving civilly. Finally, anonymous - We publish posts, but my people, not everything has to be anonymous. We understand sensitive things, but some things don't make sense, feel free to share who you are. @everyone - we wish everyone a pleasant summer in the hope that our group will be even better! Your administrators

tekst: Lijepi pozdrav svima! treba mi ozbiljna pomoć… Stalno dobivam e-mailove od Gældsstyrelsen-a (agencija za dugove), ali sam napustio Dansku 2021. godine i više nemam pristup NemID-u ni Digital Postu. Kontaktirao sam SKAT i rekli su mi da imam dug od 138.000 DKK zbog poreza, pristojbi i sličnih stvari koji su se očito nakupili tijekom godina. Napustio sam Dansku 2021. bez ikakve odjave – jednostavno sam "otišao" (moja greška) i sada me pokušavaju kontaktirati da platim dug od skoro 20 tisuca eura… Postoji li išta što mogu učiniti kako bih smanjio iznos ili ih barem obavijestio da nisam bio u Danskoj sve ove godine? Mogu li me pravno goniti ako sam sad nazad u Hrvatskoj? Hvala vam unaprijed!!
tekst_en: Greetings to everyone! i need serious help… I keep getting emails from Gældsstyrelsen (debt agency) but I left Denmark in 2021 and I no longer have access to NemID or Digital Post. I contacted SKAT and they told me that I have a debt of DKK 138,000 due to taxes, fees and similar things that have apparently accumulated over the years. I left Denmark in 2021 without any registration - I simply "left" (my fault) and now they are trying to contact me to pay a debt of almost 20 thousand euros... Is there anything I can do to reduce the amount or at least inform them that I have not been in Denmark all these years? Can I be prosecuted legally if I am now back in Croatia? Thank you in advance!!

tekst: Pozdrav, prije 2 mjeseca sam dosao u Dansku, a zena i klinci dolaze za mjesec dana. Htio bih podnijeti prijavu za djecji doplatak, ali mi nije jasno par stvari. Prvo, pretpostavljam da se radi o "child & youth benefits", a ne o "child allowance"? Bar su mi taj link dali u Newcommer service. Drugo, jel bi bilo jednostavnije pricekati da dodju ovdje i da se prijave, prije nego podnesem zahtjev? Trece, nije mi jasna sva dokumentacija. Za dokaz o prebivalistu u EU zadnjih 6/10 godina, koliko vec treba, imam potvrde s e-gradjani koje su na hrvatskom. Jel to bude ok, ili moram prevoditi na engleski/danski? I zadnje, obrazac za prijavu trazi dokument o skrbnistvu. Nije mi jasno cemu to sluzi, posto smo u braku i zivjet cemo na istoj adresi, imam rodne listove i vjencani list. Gdje to uopce izvaditi kod nas i isto kao i za potvrdu o prebivalistu, jel moram dati prevoditi? Hvala!
tekst_en: Hello, I came to Denmark 2 months ago, and my wife and kids are coming in a month. I would like to submit an application for child allowance, but I am not clear about a few things. Firstly, I assume it is about "child & youth benefits" and not "child allowance"? At least they gave me that link in the Newcommer service. Second, would it be simpler to wait for them to come here and apply before I submit the application? Third, I don't understand all the documentation. For proof of residence in the EU for the last 6/10 years, as long as it takes, I have e-citizen certificates that are in Croatian. Will that be ok, or do I have to translate into English/Danish? And finally, the application form asks for a guardianship document. It is not clear to me what this is for, since we are married and will live at the same address, I have birth certificates and a marriage certificate. Where can I get it in our country and the same as for the certificate of residence, do I have to have it translated? Thanks!

tekst: Poštovani, obraćamo Vam se sa željom da izrazimo zainteresiranost za zaposlenje. Mi smo dvojica mladih, odgovornih i motivisanih 22-godišnjaka, spremni da radimo, učimo i doprinosimo Vašem timu. Posedujemo radne navike, timski duh i volju da se prilagodimo različitim radnim zadacima. Otvoreni smo za obavljanje fizičkih poslova, terenskog rada, kao i poslova u proizvodnji, skladištu ili uslužnim djelatnostima. Brzo učimo, snalažljivi smo i uvek spremni da damo svoj maksimum. Spremni smo da radimo u smijenama i vikendom, te da uložimo dodatni trud kako bismo opravdali ukazano povjerenje. Ukoliko ukažete priliku, biće nam zadovoljstvo da se dokažemo i postanemo deo Vašeg kolektiva. Ukoliko je potrebno, dostupni smo za razgovor i dodatne informacije. Zahvaljujemo se na izdvojenom vremenu i radujemo se mogućnosti za suradnju. S poštovanjem, Antun Đuđar +385997529258 antun.dudar@gmail.com Amel Korajac +385997513464 amelkorajac97@gmail.com
tekst_en: Dear Sir/Madam, We are contacting you with the desire to express our interest in employment. We are two young, responsible and motivated 22-year-olds, ready to work, learn and contribute to your team. We have work habits, team spirit and the will to adapt to different work tasks. We are open to performing physical jobs, field work, as well as jobs in production, storage or service activities. We learn quickly, we are resourceful and always ready to give our best. We are ready to work in shifts and on weekends, and to put in extra effort to justify the trust shown. If you present the opportunity, it will be our pleasure to prove ourselves and become part of your team. If necessary, we are available for a conversation and additional information. We thank you for your time and look forward to the possibility of cooperation. Sincerely, Antun Đuđar  385997529258 antun.dudar@gmail.com Amel Korajac  385997513464 amelkorajac97@gmail.com

tekst: ZAPOŠLJAVAMO GRAĐEVINSKE I INSTALATERSKE STRUKE ZA RAD U DANSKOJ Danska firma traži iskusne radnike s važećim HR/EU dokumentima za rad na projektima diljem Danske. Ako ste stručni u svom poslu, spremni na rad u uređenom sustavu i tražite pouzdano zaposlenje u inozemstvu – prijavite se! ⸻ ‍ Tražimo sljedeće profile: • Električari • Knauferi • Soboslikari • Instalateri grijanja, vodovoda i kanalizacije (HVAC) • Stolari ⸻ Opis poslova: Zadaci ovise o specifičnom zanimanju i uključuju: • Montažu instalacija (struja, voda, grijanje, ventilacija) • Postavljanje Knauf sustava (konstrukcije, zidovi, stropovi) • Pripremu i bojanje unutarnjih površina Rad se odvija na velikim i manjim projektima diljem Danske, u timovima s drugim iskusnim majstorima. ⸻ Uvjeti: • Završena stručna škola ili dokazano višegodišnje iskustvo u struci • Samostalnost u radu, čitanju nacrta i radu s alatom • Minimalno 3–5 godina iskustva • Poznavanje engleskog ili danskog jezika (za timove dovoljno da barem jedan član komunicira na engleskom) ⸻ Što nudimo: • Konkurentna plaća i sigurna primanja • Prijava direktno kod danskog poslodavca • Plaćeno mirovinsko • Plaćeni godišnji odmor i praznici • Osigurani alat i radna odjeća • Pomoć pri pronalasku i organizaciji smještaja • Administrativna podrška ⸻ Lokacija: • Više gradilišta i projekata širom Danske ⸻ Prijava: Pošaljite svoj životopis i kontakt podatke na: josip.glibusic1@gmail.com ili privatnom porukom Natječaj je otvoren do popunjavanja radnih mjesta – prijavite se što prije!
tekst_en: WE ARE HIRING CONSTRUCTION AND INSTALLATION PROFESSIONALS TO WORK IN DENMARK A Danish company is looking for experienced workers with valid HR/EU documents to work on projects throughout Denmark. If you are an expert in your job, ready to work in an organized system and are looking for reliable employment abroad - apply! ⸻ ‍ We are looking for the following profiles: • Electricians • Knaufers • Painters • Heating, plumbing and sewage installers (HVAC) • Carpenters ⸻ Job description: Tasks depend on the specific profession and include: • Installation of installations (electricity, water, heating, ventilation) • Installation of Knauf systems (structures, walls, ceilings) • Preparation and painting of interior surfaces Work takes place on large and small projects throughout Denmark, in teams with other experienced masters. ⸻ Requirements: • Completed vocational school or proven years of professional experience • Independence in work, reading blueprints and working with tools • Minimum 3–5 years of experience • Knowledge of English or Danish (for teams, enough for at least one member to communicate in English) ⸻ What we offer: • Competitive salary and secure income • Apply directly to a Danish employer • Paid pension • Paid vacation and holidays • Provided tools and work clothes • Help in finding and accommodation organization • Administrative support ⸻ Location: • Multiple construction sites and projects throughout Denmark ⸻ Application: Send your resume and contact information to: josip.glibusic1@gmail.com or by private message The competition is open until the positions are filled - apply as soon as possible!

tekst: Pozdrav svima u grupi. Kako se pokrenuti drustveno u Danskoj? Upoznati nove osobe s nasih prostora,mozda upoznati ljubav,druziti se,imati socijalni zivot? Koga god upoznam ovdje iz drugih religija ili zemalja nije se pokazao prijateljem na duge staze,o vezama da ne govorimo.. Sve ovo baca na depresiju. Imam posao i neovisnost o nikome, ali nekako se nevidim ovdje na duge staze glede ljubavi i drustvenog zivota.. Dani prolaze sa posla na posao.. Hvala
tekst_en: Hello everyone in the group. How to get started socially in Denmark? Meet new people from our area, maybe meet love, socialize, have a social life? Whoever I meet here from other religions or countries has not proved to be a friend in the long run, not to mention relationships.. All of this is attributed to depression. I have a job and independence from anyone, but somehow I don't see myself here in the long run in terms of love and social life.. Days go from work to work.. Thank you

tekst: Pozdrav svima! Za tebe – ako imaš vještinu ili uslugu koju možeš ponuditi! Imaš strast, poseban talent – ili jednostavno želiš zaraditi nešto dodatno – ali još nemaš budžet za pokretanje pravog biznisa? U Danskoj, srećom, možeš voditi mali hobi-posao prije nego što se u potpunosti upustiš u samostalno poslovanje s CVR brojem. To se zove PMV shema – omogućuje ti da testiraš tržište i zaradiš do 50.000 DKK godišnje bez registracije CVR-a. Problem? Tvoje objave nestanu u Facebook grupama za nekoliko sati… Zato pokrećem hobbiies.dk – potpuno novu platformu gdje hobisti mogu napraviti profil, a ljudi iz njihove blizine lako pronaći točno onu pomoć koju traže: Friziranje u dnevnoj sobi Privatne glazbene ili jezične poduke Puno ljubavi za čuvanje pasa Domaći kolači za proslave Sitni popravci i pomoć u kućnim radovima … i još mnogo toga! Budući da hobisti najčešće rade od kuće, cijene su obično niže – niži troškovi, ne i niža kvaliteta. Win-win za sve! Krećemo 30. svibnja. Jesi li hobist? Prijavi se sada i prvi doznaj kad otvaramo. Tražiš hobista? Spremi stranicu i budi među prvima. Prijavi se odmah na https://www.hobbiies.dk/ – iduća dva tjedna traje early bird prijava. Pomozi mi da pomognem drugima! Hvala ti što si pročitao/la – slobodno podijeli ili označi prijatelja koji bi ovo trebao vidjeti!
tekst_en: Hello everyone! For you - if you have a skill or service to offer! Do you have a passion, a special talent - or simply want to earn something extra - but you don't have the budget to start a real business yet? In Denmark, fortunately, you can run a small hobby-business before fully engaging in independent business with a CVR number. This is called the PMV scheme - it allows you to test the market and earn up to DKK 50,000 per year without registering a CVR. Problem? Your posts disappear in Facebook groups in a few hours... That's why I'm launching hobbiies.dk - a completely new platform where hobbyists can create a profile and people close to them can easily find exactly the help they're looking for: Hairdressing in the living room Private music or language lessons Lots of love for dog sitting Homemade cakes for celebrations Small repairs and help with housework ... and much more! Since hobbyists usually work from home, the prices are usually lower - lower costs, not lower quality. Win-win for everyone! We leave on May 30. Are you a hobbyist? Sign up now and be the first to know when we open. Looking for a hobbyist? Save the page and be among the first. Sign up now at https://www.hobbiies.dk/ - early bird registration continues for the next two weeks. Help me help others! Thank you for reading - feel free to share or tag a friend who should see this!
